items.title: Weighted Averages Lie About AI Readiness — The Case for Bottleneck Scoring
items.description:
Hook

Most self-assessment tools score you the same way: answer questions, multiply by weights, sum it up. Higher total = more ready.

items.title: Shipping With No Analytics
items.description: When I launched my app I made a decision I was quietly proud of — no analytics, nothing tracked, no data collection at all.
